title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Devyani International Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Devyani International Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Devyani International Holdings Services in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Devyani International Holdings Services:
Devyani International Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International Holdings Services!
